response.justification: This is a strong, versatile senior individual contributor — but the role is a CTO mandate, and the resume shows essentially no executive or people-leadership experience. There is no evidence of scaling teams from 10 to 30+, developing a technical-leadership layer, governing outsourced delivery partners, or communicating with a board. The agentic-AI exposure (MCP tooling at Stripe) is adjacent developer tooling, not production ownership of multi-agent systems with financial consequences. Fintech exposure at Stripe and RIDE Capital is genuine but at the IC level. The gap between senior IC and scale-up CTO is too wide for this search.
strengths: Relevant fintech exposure at Stripe (payments) and RIDE Capital (investments)
Hands-on agentic-AI adjacency: MCP code generators and agent-workflow tooling at Stripe
Solid distributed-systems background, including low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second
concerns: No people-management, org-scaling, or executive leadership experience anywhere in the career history
No production multi-agent AI systems operated in regulated or high-stakes environments — only developer tooling contributions
No experience with board communication, hybrid/outsourced engineering governance, or credit-risk domain work

key_factors.factor: Missing engineering-leadership and team-scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI system ownership
